caseStudies.title: AI Readiness Roadmap
caseStudies.challenge: A public-sector organization needed a pragmatic path to evaluate AI opportunities without increasing operational risk.
caseStudies.solution: 365INO structured discovery workshops, prioritized automation candidates, and defined governance for responsible adoption.
caseStudies.outcome: Leadership gained a sequenced roadmap for pilots, controls, workforce enablement, and investment decisions.

caseStudies.title: Enterprise Portfolio Visibility
caseStudies.challenge: Executives lacked consistent insight into program health, blockers, dependencies, and delivery tradeoffs.
caseStudies.solution: 365INO designed a right-sized PMO operating model, reporting cadence, and executive dashboard framework.
caseStudies.outcome: Decision makers could spot risk earlier, coordinate cross-team work, and focus meetings on outcomes.
metrics: Illustrative: 40% reduction in status prep time

caseStudies.title: Cloud Workflow Modernization
caseStudies.challenge: Manual request routing and legacy collaboration patterns were slowing service delivery.
caseStudies.solution: 365INO mapped the process, redesigned handoffs, and recommended low-code automation with secure data practices.
caseStudies.outcome: Teams received a practical modernization blueprint for workflow automation and scalable reporting.
